title: cynoglossum officinale f. hybridum
intro: Cynoglossum officinale f. hybridum, also known as Gypsy-flower or Chinese Forget-me-not, is a hybrid plant species of the Cynoglossum officinale, which is native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum officinale f. hybridum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically harvested and prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in traditional herbal remedies and supplements.
